name: NutritionColours Citation Exchange Protocol
description: Machine-readable citation mapping between NutritionColours clinical content and authoritative medical sources (PubMed, Wikidata, MeSH). Demonstrates academic authority and bidirectional knowledge graph integration.

citation.name: Clinical Nutrition Evidence Base
citation.description: 20 authoritative citations from PubMed, Wikidata, and MeSH databases

summary.citationPolicy: All clinical claims supported by PubMed-indexed research with evidence level grading
